licenses.name: European Union Public Licence 1.2
licenses.description: Copyleft license designed for EU public sector software; legally valid across all EU jurisdictions. Compatible with several other copyleft licenses.

compatibility.notes: Specifically designed for EU law. Compatible (at distribution) with GPL-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0, LGPL, MPL, CDDL, EPL. Good for government and public sector projects in Europe.
